name: Glogg IV
recipeIngredient: 4 cups cranberry juice cocktail (32 oz bottle)
recipeInstructions:
1. Tie the spices in a cheesecloth bag or gauze and place in a saucepan.
2. Add 2 cups of cranberry juice cocktail, raisins, and sugar to the pot. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Remove the spice bag from the pot.
5. Before serving, add the remaining cranberry juice and port wine to the pot. Heat until almost boiling (do not boil).
6. Pour into a heat-proof pitcher and serve in mugs or punch cups, adding a few raisins to each.
